title: Taserface
content:
{{CharHub|Taserface|Taserface}} {{Character |image = TFace Profile.JPG |real name = |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Taserface{{Ref|GotGV2}} |derivatives = Tazr Face{{Ref|TGotGHS}}}} |species = |gender = Male |DOD = [[2014|October 2014]]{{Ref|GotGV2}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |title = Captain |affiliation = {{Affiliation|RVG}} (exiled)
*{{Affiliation|YRC}} |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'' |tv movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[The Ravagers]]'' |actor = [[Chris Sullivan]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|You're the one what killed those men by leading them down the wrong path. Because you're weak and stupid! It's time for the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] to rise once again to glory with a new captain: Taserface!|Taserface to [[Yondu Udonta]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} '''Taserface''' was a [[Ravagers|Ravager]] mercenary and a lieutenant in the [[Yondu Ravager Clan]]. In [[2014]], following [[Yondu Udonta]]'s exile established by [[Stakar Ogord]], Taserface led a mutiny against Udonta, claiming he was not a suitable Ravager captain. Taserface, allying with [[Nebula]] had the Ravagers loyal to Udonta executed, and imprisoned Udonta, [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] and [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] [[Rocket]] and [[Groot]] in the brig of the ''[[Eclector]]''. When they made their [[Escape from the Eclector|escape]], Taserface relayed an emergency message to the [[Sovereign]] in tipping off their location, before he was killed in the ''Eclector''’s destruction. ==Biography== ===Christmas Presents=== One December, [[Peter Quill]] wrapped a present for Taserface whilst trying to re-create Christmas, although the gift was thrown away by [[Yondu Udonta]] before Taserface could unwrap it.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ===Ravager Mutiny=== ====Gaining Ravager Support==== [[File:Taserface drink.png|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface enacts his rebellious plans]] {{Quote|First [[Peter Quill|Quill]] betrays us and [[Yondu]] just lets him go, scot-free. Now he's getting all riled over [[Stakar Ogord|nothing]]. We followed him 'cause he was the one wasn't afraid to do what needed to be done. Seems like he's going soft.|Taserface to [[Yondu Ravager Clan]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Taserface, along with [[Yondu Udonta]] faction of [[Ravagers]], went to the [[Iron Lotus]] to relax. Taserface watched as [[Stakar Ogord]] reminded Udonta of the reasons behind his and his clan's exile. Right as Stakar left, [[Ayesha]] arrived to hire Udonta and his faction to hunt down the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] who had stolen [[Anulax Batteries]] from them. Udonta took the job. Meanwhile, Taserface was sitting with [[Retch]] and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], discussing that Udonta was becoming soft and began planning a mutiny against him.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Attack on Berhert]]==== [[File:GotGV2 HD Stills 8.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface betrays [[Yondu]]]] {{Quote|No matter how many times [[Peter Quill|Quill]] betrays [[Yondu|you]], you protect him like none of the rest of us much matter. I'm the one what sticks up for you."
"Damn straight, lad, he's gone soft. Suppose it's time for a change in leadership.|[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] and Taserface|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} The Ravagers managed to track down the ''[[Milano]]'' to [[Berhert]]. While [[Rocket]] managed to take down many of the Ravagers with his booby traps, [[Yondu]] got the upper hand on him with his [[Yaka Arrow]]. When Yondu decided to just take the batteries instead of bringing in Rocket, Taserface turned on Udonta, saying he has gone soft. The Ravagers then turned on each other and were about to engage in a fight when [[Nebula]] shot Yondu in the head, destroying his [[Yaka Arrow Controller]] and knocking him out.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Executing Ravagers==== [[File:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 86.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface celebrates his victory]] {{Quote|Your name is...It's Taserface?"
"That's right."
"Do you shoot tasers out of your face?"
"It's metaphorical!|[[Rocket]] and Taserface|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Taserface and his newly loyal [[Ravagers]] then took [[Yondu Udonta]] along with [[Rocket]] and [[Groot]] back to the ''[[Eclector]]'' in order to collect the bounty that the [[Kree Empire]] had placed on Udonta and then the [[Sovereign]] to collect Rocket and Groot's bounty. Any Ravager members that had sided with Udonta, including [[Tullk]] and [[Oblo]], were executed by being released into space. [[File:Taserface threat.png|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface is mocked by [[Rocket]]]] Udonta, being subdued, watched as Taserface took control of the Ravagers and beat him up, claiming that his poor leadership was what led to his friends' deaths. When Rocket heard Taserface's name, he broke out laughing, telling him how ridiculous his name was, causing even [[Gef]] and the other Ravagers to mock him. Before he could kill Rocket, [[Nebula]] intervened, pointing out there was more profit in delivering them alive, and that she wanted a cut of the take. Taserface put all three of them into a cell where he told Udonta he deserved everything that was happening to him as he broke the Ravager code.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Escape from the Eclector|Escape from the ''Eclector'']]==== [[File:Taserface-ShockedFace.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface notices [[Yondu Udonta]]'s arrow]] {{Quote|I am sending you the coordinates for [[Yondu]]'s ship. I only ask one thing. That your [[Ayesha|High Priestess]], tell him the name of the man what sealed his fate: Taserface!|Taserface to the [[Sovereign Chambermaid]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Taserface was sleeping in [[Yondu Udonta]]'s quarters when ''{{WPS|Come a Little Bit Closer}}'', playing from [[Peter Quill]]'s Walkman, started blaring through the loudspeakers. Taserface quickly woke up and realized that Udonta had retrieved his [[Yaka Arrow Controller]]. He quickly warned the [[Ravagers]] and ordered them to find and kill Udonta and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. As Taserface was walking through the ''[[Eclector]]''’s halls, he ducked as Udonta's [[Yaka Arrow]] whizzed past him. He then grinned at a security camera while snarling that Udonta had missed when he sees that the arrow had struck a large pile of flammable materials, causing an explosion. [[File:Taserface-FinalMoments.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Taserface sends a message before his death]] His body wracked by the explosion, Taserface crawled over to a monitor and called the [[Sovereign]], telling a [[Sovereign Chambermaid|chambermaid]], who was taking the call, the coordinates to [[Yondu Udonta]] and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. He told her to inform Udonta that he was the one who tipped off the Sovereign and essentially sent him to his death. When he told them his name, however, the Sovereign just broke out laughing. Taserface could only resignedly groan in defeat as he listened to the Sovereign laughing at his name just before an explosion broke out, and destroyed the lower half of the ''[[Eclector]]'', killing Taserface.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Thief''': Taserface was a very good thief, being able to eventually start his own clan. Although it didn't last long. *'''Expert Tactician''': Taserface was the leader of the rebellion that got almost every [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravager]] to overthrow [[Yondu Udonta]] and his supporters. ==Equipment== ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Eclector]]''''': As a [[Ravagers|Ravager]], Taserface lived on the ''Eclector''. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Ravagers]] **[[Yondu Ravager Clan]] - Teammates ***[[Gef]] † ***[[Retch]] † ***[[Halfnut]] † ***[[Brahl]] † ***[[Narblik]] † ***[[Scrote]] † ***[[Vorker]] † ***[[Huhtar]] † ***[[Shran]] † *[[Sovereign]] **[[Ayesha]] † - Employer **[[Sovereign Chambermaid]] *[[Nebula]] - Former Enemy {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] **[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] - Former Teammate **[[Rocket]] **[[Groot]] *[[Yondu Udonta]] † - Former Leader and Killer *[[Tullk]] † - Former Teammate *[[Oblo]] † - Former Teammate *[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] - Former Teammate {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Taserface is a warrior member of the [[w:c:marvel:Stark (Race)|Stark]], a race who evolved thanks to [[Tony Stark]]'s technology, that eventually lost his rank and name and adopted the alias of '''Overkill'''. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[James Gunn]] wanted to introduce Taserface on the first ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' film, but Marvel was not so keen on the idea and decided it would be better for him to be introduced in the [[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2|sequel]].[http://ew.com/movies/2017/04/22/chris-sullivan-taserface-guardians-of-the-galaxy-vol-2/ This Is Us star Chris Sullivan on his unrecognizable Guardians 2 role] *[[Aden Stay]] was a stunt double for [[Chris Sullivan]] in the role of Taserface. ==References== {{Gallery|Taserface/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Taserface}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Yellow Eyes]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Ravagers Members]] [[Category:Ravagers Captains]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Yondu]]
